title: AFI Enrichment Category Result — news v1 (afi.enrichment.news.v1)
description: The canonical output contract for the 'news' open analysis lane: the ONE resolved result a news provider/plugin contributes to the scorer-facing join (afi.enrichment.news.v1). A provider-produced news result MUST pass this validation at the provider-adapter edge BEFORE it reaches scoring (PBF-GOV D-PBF-8); a malformed result never reaches the scorer. The category marker MUST be 'news'. A news provider may internally evaluate many articles/sources, but it contributes exactly ONE news result at the pipeline boundary (D-PBF-2). The result carries a news-shock summary and derived features; it NEVER carries a credential value or a credentialed URL (BYOK boundary, D-PBF-7).
$comment: BOUNDARY: category-result payload contract — validates a runtime category output, not a stored artifact; the discriminator is the 'category' marker. Referenced by the analysis-plugin outputSchemaRef 'afi.enrichment.news.v1'. additionalProperties:false at the top level ensures no unexpected field (including a leaked credentialed URL) rides in the result.
x-afiPartOf: AFI Provider Adapter & BYOK Foundations v0.1 (PBF-GOV)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: afi-governance/decisions/provider-byok-foundations-v0.1 (PBF-GOV) D-PBF-2/D-PBF-7/D-PBF-8 — one resolved result per category; credential never in the result; provider output passes canonical category validation before scoring

category.description: Category marker. MUST be 'news' — the deterministic one-per-category join classifies contributions by this marker.

news.description: News-shock summary payload (analysis data; deep shape owned by the news feature layer). Carries no credential and no credentialed URL.

newsFeatures.description: Derived, non-secret news features consumed downstream.
